title: Bindings, Scope, Closures, and Lifetime · Independent Script Trial
summary: Build configurable counters and validators without leaking mutable state across community-service widgets. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a closure-backed state and validation library with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Choose const, let, or legacy var from reassignment, scope, and initialization behavior.
Resolve names through lexical environments and identify shadowing without guessing from call order.
Predict declaration instantiation, function hoisting, and temporal dead-zone failures.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
